channel.title: #Daily on Efe Akbalık
channel.description: Recent content in #Daily on Efe Akbalık

item.title: The
item.description:
I can’t think anything special for the first post so i am gonna talk about a new (i guess) technology i did learn today.

“Gaussian Splatting” you may call it i also saw it as “3DGS” which sounds cooler, anyways it is basicly 3d image made with lots of dots, you can learn more about it from here. I am surprised how i didn’t hear about it since it became very popular in 2023 (as they say) but i am sure lot more people will learn it with this fancy video.
